summary: Frontend wallet connection fixes verified. All 4 features from the fix intent are working correctly: (1) Connect Wallet button opens RainbowKit modal reliably after Play Now flow, (2) Service worker no longer forces immediate page reload - shows user-friendly update notification with 'Refresh Now'/'Later' options, (3) Wrong network button correctly uses openChainModal() for network switching with fallback to openAccountModal(), (4) WalletConnect option is visible in connect modal for Telegram-compatible flow.

issues: Minor React warning: jsx attribute receives true boolean instead of string (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ MainMenu.js (lines 774-789): Wrong network button correctly calls openChainModal() as primary action with openAccountModal() fallback
✓ serviceWorkerRegistration.js (lines 86-96): SW_ACTIVATED handler only triggers callback, does NOT force window.location.reload()
✓ service-worker.js (lines 46-53): Activation event sends SW_ACTIVATED message to clients, does NOT reload pages
✓ wagmi.js (lines 42-50): WalletConnect metadata properly configured with dynamic appUrl, projectId from env, and correct icon URL
✓ Connect button (line 761-772): Uses typeof check before calling openConnectModal to prevent undefined errors

success_rate.backend: N/A - Backend testing skipped per request
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 4 wallet reliability fixes verified working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet connection reliability fixes have been verified. Desktop and Mobile viewports tested. RainbowKit modal opens correctly with WalletConnect option visible. Service worker update flow does not interrupt wallet connections - shows non-blocking notification. Wrong network button uses correct chain modal API.

details: Connect Wallet button (data-testid='connect-wallet-btn') is visible and clickable
Clicking button reliably opens RainbowKit connect modal
Modal shows popular wallet options: Rainbow, Coinbase Wallet, MetaMask, WalletConnect
Works on both Desktop (1920x1080) and Mobile (390x844) viewports
Service worker shows 'New Lab Update!' notification with 'Refresh Now' and 'Later' options
SW_ACTIVATED message does not trigger automatic page reload
Users can dismiss update notification and continue wallet connect flow uninterrupted
Console confirms: '[SW] Service worker activated' followed by '[Version] New version available'
MainMenu.js lines 774-789: chain.unsupported condition renders 'Switch Network' button
Button onClick first tries openChainModal() - correct API for network switching
Falls back to openAccountModal() only if openChainModal unavailable
Button has data-testid='switch-network-btn' and title='Switch to DogeOS Chikyū Testnet'
WalletConnect option is visible in RainbowKit connect modal
Tested on mobile viewport (390x844) simulating Telegram WebApp
wagmi.js correctly configures walletConnectParameters with metadata
projectId properly set from REACT_APP_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID env var
Metadata URL uses window.location.origin for dynamic app URL

mobile_tests: All wallet options available: Rainbow, MetaMask, Coinbase, WalletConnect
